decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id 'project_34th-st-sbs-2012' already exists in the registry with matching payload: project_name '34th Street Select Bus Service' (vs. observation label '34th Street SBS' — same project), project_type 'Select Bus Service', status 'design and construction', borough 'Manhattan', and overlapping description of off-board fare collection, bus lanes, bus bulbs, and loading zones on 34th Street. The observation's source '120507_brt_cb6_34th_street' is already listed in the registry record's source_ids. No other 34th Street registry records match: project_34th-street-bus-priority is a different bus_priority project from ~2008; project_34th-street-busway is a busway project; project_34th-street-enhanced-bus-priority is a study; project_34th-street-transitway-concept is a transitway concept. The closest match IS the observation's own base_record_id, so this is 'new' — the observation already resolves to that canonical record.

evidence_refs.source_quote: 34 th Street SBS Presentation to Manhattan CB 6 Transportation Committee
60 ft wide section: East of Third Ave West of Ninth Ave
